svg.title: Location map (-23.6,-46.6)
svg.desc: A location map of the region with latitudes between −23.67° and −23.44°, and longitudes between −46.79° and −46.49°. Equirectangular projection, scale 1 : 279 000. The data for this map come from the OpenStreetMap contributors, and are made available by OpenStreetMap under theOpen Database License. It was accessed on 2025 Dec 29. The map itself was generated bya Python script written by Justin Kunimune.
